prose.overview: Panya Indra Golf Club is one of Bangkok's most accessible and playable courses, located just 25 minutes from the city centre in the Minburi and Ram Indra districts. Designed by Ronald Fream and David Dale, the 27-hole facility is divided into three distinct nine-hole courses — the Lagoon, Palm, and Garden — which are rotated to offer different 18-hole combinations. The club is notable for its extensive night golf offering, floodlit for evening play. At a weekday green fee of approximately 3,950 THB (green fee only — caddie and cart separate), it sits at a mid-range price point and attracts a broad mix of Bangkok locals, expats, and international visitors looking for a convenient, well-maintained round close to the city.
prose.layout_and_experience: Water is the defining characteristic of Panya Indra — dominant hazards appear on nearly every hole across all three nines, with lakes and ponds frequently running alongside fairways or directly in front of greens. The Lagoon Course is the most demanding, with several par-3s requiring full carries over water and approach angles that leave little room for error. The Palm and Garden nines are somewhat more forgiving, but still demand accurate shot-making. The rolling fairway contours add variety to what is otherwise a relatively flat Bangkok-area site. Greens are well maintained and the overall playing surface is consistent. The course suits mid-to-high handicappers who are comfortable with water on both sides.
prose.tips: Night golf rates (afternoon/evening tee times) are discounted below the standard green fee — useful for golfers who want to play after work or during the cooler evening hours. Budget separately for caddie (500 THB standard / 1,000 THB premium) and cart (1,000 THB) on top of the green fee. Weekend rates were not confirmed at time of writing — contact the club directly or book through a booking platform for current pricing. The course is one of the closer Phase 1 courses to central Bangkok, making it a practical option when time is limited.
prose.location_and_access: Panya Indra Golf Club is located in the northeast of Bangkok in the Minburi and Ram Indra districts, approximately 20km and 25 minutes from central Bangkok. The course is accessible by car or Grab without needing an expressway. It is close to the east outer ring road, making it convenient from multiple Bangkok hotel locations.
prose.rental_cta_context: Playing Panya Indra Golf Club in Bangkok? Order premium clubs delivered to your hotel — available for morning, afternoon, or night golf.
